recommendations.title: 1. Use MessagePack instead of JSON
recommendations.description: Binary format reduces serialization overhead by 40-50%

recommendations.title: 2. Integer field key mapping
recommendations.description: Replace long field names (device_id, temperature) with integer IDs (1, 2)

recommendations.title: 3. Delta encoding for numeric fields
recommendations.description: Send delta from base value instead of full value for each update

recommendations.title: 4. Columnar batch format
recommendations.description: Batch of N updates: arrays of values per field instead of array of objects

recommendations.title: 5. Combine batching + binary serialization
recommendations.description: 50ms batch window + MsgPack = 75% frame reduction + 50% bandwidth savings
